LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ARNOLD LAUB AND STEVEN FABBRO'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, ANSWER WITHIN TWENTY DAYS. CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PER PARAGRAPH 17. ATTORNEYS OWE CLIENTS A FIDUCIARY DUTY. FRAUD IS PLED WITH PARTICULARITY, PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED TORT CLAIMS SEPARATE AND A PART FROM CONSPIRACY. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF'S CONSPIRACY CLAIMS ARE PROPER AND THE COURT, SUA SPONTE, STRIKES THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUBSTITUTES THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION. MS. GONZALES IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

APPEARANCES: DENISE GONZALES, PRO PER (415.221.0437) APPEARING ON HER OWN BEHALF. FRANK MORELLI, ESQUIRE (LAW OFFICES OF ARNOLD J. LAUB, 415.262.0101) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, ANSWER WITHIN TWENTY DAYS. CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PER PARAGRAPH 17. ATTORNEYS OWE CLIENTS A FIDUCIARY DUTY. FRAUD IS PLED WITH PARTICULARITY, PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED TORT CLAIMS SEPARATE AND A PART FROM CONSPIRACY. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF'S CONSPIRACY CLAIMS ARE PROPER AND THE COURT, SUA SPONTE, STRIKES THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUBSTITUTES THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION. MS. GONZALES IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
